name: IRC_CX_SITES_B
description: Details of the sites which is used to publish the jobs.

columns.Name: SITE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the site. System generated value.

columns.Name: PREVIEW_THEME_ID
columns.Comments: ID of site theme which is used for preview.

columns.Name: SITE_URL_NAME
columns.Comments: Site Display Name for URL configured by the customer in the site editor visible in the URL

columns.Name: EVENTS_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Column indicating if events are enabled per site. Will be used by UI to control if events are exposed to users.

columns.Name: EMAIL_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the email template for the given site (foreign key to IRC_MESSAGE_DESIGNS_B)

columns.Name: SITE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the Site (External or Internal). EXT - for Existing CE site, ICE - for new internal SITE

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SITE_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique site code defined by administrator.

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the site,  auto generated value.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the site informing whether site is active or not

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Order of the site on the list of sites.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_LANG
columns.Comments: Default language in which site will be displayed.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_THEME_ID
columns.Comments: ID of site theme which is activated for site. Column is deprecated.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.
